{{Quote|Worlds as spread apart as Havricus, Sermeria, Tynna, Nar Bo Sholla and Deylerax have reported damage from stone mites, though nothing on Ord Tiddell's scale.|HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN" />}}
'''Nar Bo Sholla''' was a [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] that was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]] [[spor crawler]] [[Insect/Legends|insect]]. It was a part of the [[Hutt Empire]] twenty-five [[Millennium/Legends|millennia]] before the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]]. In [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]], the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Morteos]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on Nar Bo Sholla. [[22 BBY/Legends|Three years]] later, it became one of the worlds that suffered damage from an infestation of the structure-damaging [[Arthropod/Legends|arthropods]] known as [[Stone mite/Legends|stone mites]]. The [[Nar Bo Sholla system/Legends|Nar Bo Sholla system]] was later [[Battle of the Nar Bo Sholla system|conquered]] by the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|invasion]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Description==
{{Quote|This small but deadly pest is native to Nar Bo Sholla ''[…]''<nowiki />|Holobrochure for the Tagge Holographic Museum of Chandrila|<ref name="Creatures" />}}
Nar Bo Sholla was a terrestrial<ref name="Creatures" /> [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="HNN" /> located in the [[Nar Bo Sholla system/Legends|Nar Bo Sholla system]], a part of the [[Hutt Space/Legends|Hutt Space]] portion of [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]]. The world was situated between the [[Irith system/Legends|Irith]] and [[Keldooine system/Legends|Keldooine systems]] on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]] known as the [[Ootmian Pabol/Legends|''Ootmian Pabol'']], while the ''[[Pabol Kreeta]]'' connected it to the [[Nar Kreeta system/Legends|Nar Kreeta system]].<ref name="TEA" /> The [[Species/Legends|species]] of [[Poison/Legends|poisonous]], [[Death/Legends|deadly]] [[Insect/Legends|insect]] known as the [[spor crawler]], which had adapted itself to burrowing in dirt and sand, was [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to Nar Bo Sholla, although it eventually spread throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] via [[Black market/Legends|black market]] trade.<ref name="Creatures" />

==History==
{{Quote|Ord Tiddell is the largest casualty in a bizarre series of stone mites infestations spreading throughout the Colonies and Mid Rim.|HoloNet News report|<ref name="HNN" />}}
[[File:NarBoShollaXimWars-TEA.jpg|thumb|left|220px|Nar Bo Sholla was a part of the Hutt Empire during the Xim Wars.]]
A part of the [[Hutt Empire]] during the [[Xim Wars]] of [[25,102 BBY]]–[[25,096 BBY]],<ref name="TEA" /> by the [[Great ReSynchronization|date]] [[22 BBY/Legends|13:5:9]] Nar Bo Sholla became one of the several worlds of the [[Galaxy/Legends|galaxy]] that experienced an infestation of [[Stone mite/Legends|stone mites]]—[[Arthropod/Legends|arthropods]] feeding on [[Silicate/Legends|silicates]] and complex metals. An issue of the [[HoloNet News CoCo District Edition|CoCo District Edition]] of the [[HoloNet News/Legends|HoloNet News]] released on that date noted that Nar Bo Sholla reported damage to the world's structures from the infestation.<ref name="HNN" />

The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Assassin/Legends|assassin]] [[Morteos]] was [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] on Nar Bo Sholla<ref name="WbC" /> in [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]],<ref name="MorteosDate">[[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']] is dated to three [[Standard year/Legends|years]] after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]]. Since ''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' dates that conflict to [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], the placement of the sourcebook therefore translates to [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]. Furthermore, since ''Wanted by Cracken'' states that [[Morteos]] is age 32, he must have been [[Reproduction/Legends|born]] in [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]].</ref> a fact which was noted<ref name="WbC" /> in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]<ref name="MorteosDate" /> by [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] [[General/Legends|General]] [[Airen Cracken/Legends|Airen Cracken]] in ''[[Wanted by Cracken]]'', a [[Datafile/Legends|datafile]] that served as a compilation of reports on various threats to the New Republic.<ref name="WbC" /> At some point during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|reign]] of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], an entry of a [[Holo-brochure|holobrochure]] for the [[Tagge Holographic Museum]] of [[Chandrila/Legends|Chandrila]] dedicated to the spor crawler mentioned the creature's origin on Nar Bo Sholla.<ref name="Creatures" /> The Nar Bo Sholla [[Star system/Legends|system]] was [[Battle of the Nar Bo Sholla system|conquered]] by the military forces of the [[Yuuzhan Vong galaxy|extra-galactic]] [[Yuuzhan Vong]] at some point between [[26 ABY/Legends|26 ABY]] and [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] during their [[Yuuzhan Vong War|conquest]] of the galaxy.<ref name="TEA" />

==Behind the scenes==
Nar Bo Sholla was first mentioned in the [[1993]] ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' supplement [[Wanted by Cracken (sourcebook)|''Wanted by Cracken'']], which was written by [[Louis J. Prosperi]] for [[West End Games]].<ref name="WbC" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Nar Bo Sholla system, and therefore Nar Bo Sholla itself, in grid square R-10.<ref name="TEA" />
